ddls:
CREATE TABLE "navigation_elements" (
  "element_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each navigation element */,
  "display_control" TEXT /* Type of display control (e.g., Global Navigation, Footer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the navigation element */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the navigation element is active or not */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the navigation element was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the navigation element was last updated */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the data source */,
  "storage_mode_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the storage mode */,
  "expiration_policy_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the expiration policy */,
  "implementation_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the implementation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("element_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_navigation_elements_expiration_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("expiration_policy_id") REFERENCES expiration_policies ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_navigation_elements_storage_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("storage_mode_id") REFERENCES storage_modes ("mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_navigation_elements_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_navigation_elements_implementation_id FOREIGN KEY ("implementation_id") REFERENCES implementations ("implementation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "connection_string" TEXT /* Connection string to access the data source */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the data source is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "storage_modes" (
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each storage mode */,
  "mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the storage mode */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the storage mode */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Whether the storage mode is the default option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expiration_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expiration policy */,
  "policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the expiration policy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expiration policy */,
  "expiration_interval" INTEGER /* Interval (in minutes) for data expiration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "implementations" (
  "implementation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each implementation file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the JavaScript file */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the implementation does */,
  "code" TEXT /* Actual JavaScript code for the implementation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("implementation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user-role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the navigation element that was changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the field that was changed */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the field that was changed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES navigation_elements ("element_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "element_sources" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the link between elements and sources */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the navigation element */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source associated with the element */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Whether the data source is the primary source for the element */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_element_sources_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_element_sources_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES navigation_elements ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail entry */,
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the log entry */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field that was changed */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the field that was changed */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the field that was changed */,
  "changed_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("log_id") REFERENCES logs ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Whether the notification has been read */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "app_name" TEXT /* Name of the application */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the application */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "element_applications" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the link between elements and applications */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the navigation element */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application associated with the element */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Whether the application is the default for the element */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_element_applications_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_element_applications_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES navigation_elements ("element_id")
)
